meta-description: Learn about your Summary of Benefits and Coverage (SBC) by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Summary of Benefits and Coverage (SBC)
excerpt: An easy-to-read summary that lets you make apples-to-apples comparisons of costs and coverage between health plans. You can compare options based on price, benefits, and other features that may be important to you. You'll get the "Summary of Benefits and Coverage" (SBC) when you shop for coverage on your own or through your job, renew or change coverage, or request an SBC from the health insurance company.
